name: Tokyo

palette.name: Concrete Mist
palette.rationale: Neutral concrete and stone tones dominate many streetscapes.

palette.name: Lantern Crimson
palette.rationale: Festival signage and shrines contribute recurring deep reds.

palette.name: Night Rail Blue
palette.rationale: A stylized accent inspired by evening transit networks.

editorialSummary: Tokyo combines muted infrastructure tones with vivid cultural accents and nocturnal editorial contrast.
